title: Kannale Kallu Lyrics Nagarvalam
stanzas:
<div>
Kannale Kallu Song Lyrics From Nagarvalam

Orumurai piranthaen
orumurai piranthaen
unakena uyiraiyum
naan koduppaen.

manadhinil unnai
sumappadhinaale
maranaththai thaandi
vaazhndhiruppen

en kannil unai vaithae
kaatchigalai paarpen.
oru nimidam unai marakka
muyandrathile thottren.

neeye en idhayamadi
neeye en jeevanadi.

undhan netri meedhile
thuli varvai varalaagumaa
chinna thaaga neeyumthaan
manam thaangumaa

un kannile thuli neeraiyum
nee sindhavum vidamaatten.
un nizhalaiyum tharai meedhile
nadamaadavum vidamaatten

orey udal orey uyir
orey manam
ninaikkaiyil inikkirathe

neeye en idhayamadi
neeye en jeevanadi.

kaatru veesum maalaiyil
kadarkaraiyil nadai podanum
... paimaram padageri
dhisai maaranum.

oli veesidum iru kangalthaan
vazhi kaattidum kalangaiyaa
karai saeravae manam illaiye
ena thondrinaal adhu pizhaiyaa

nenjukulle unnai vaithu
poottivittu saaviyai
tholaithu vitten.

neeye en idhayamadaa
neeye en jeevanadaa

Orumurai piranthaen
orumurai piranthaen
unakena uyiraiyum
naan koduppaen.

manadhinil unnai
sumappadhinaale
maranaththai thaandi
vaazhndhiruppen

en kannil unai vaithae
kaatchigalai paarpen.
oru nimidam unai marakka
muyandrathile thottren.

neeye en idhayamadaa
neeye en jeevanadaa

seo.title: Kannale Kallu Lyrics Nagarvalam
seo.description: Full Kannale Kallu songs lyrics, sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Mohan Rajan, Music: Pavan, Singer(s): Saaviya, Yogi Sekar.
seo.keywords: Mohan Rajan, Pavan, Saaviya, Yogi Sekar, Kannale Kallu full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Kannale Kallu lyrics snippets, Kannale Kallu WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Kannale Kallu lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannale Kallu?

The song revolves around themes of love and longing, capturing deep emotions through its lyrics and melody.

Who are the singers of Kannale Kallu?

The song is sung by Saaviya and Yogi Sekar.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kannale Kallu?

The lyrics were penned by Mohan Rajan.

Who composed the music for Kannale Kallu?

The music was composed by Pavan.

When was Kannale Kallu released?

The song was released in 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannale Kallu from the movie Nagarvalam is a romantic duet that beautifully expresses the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Saaviya and Yogi Sekar, the song's lyrics by Mohan Rajan convey a deep sense of devotion and yearning. Pavan's soothing composition enhances the emotional depth, making it a perfect melody for moments of reflection and romance. The song evokes a sense of nostalgia and tenderness, resonating with anyone who has experienced the intensity of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful blend of Kannale Kallu with the enchanting voices of Saaviya and Yogi Sekar. This romantic melody from Nagarvalam captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully penned by Mohan Rajan. Let Pavan's soothing music take you on an emotional journey.
stanzaMeanings: I was born once, I was born once, I would even give my life for you.
Because I carry you in my heart, I would live beyond death.
I keep you in my eyes and see visions. I failed in trying to forget you for a minute.
You are my heart, you are my life.
Can a drop of sweat fall on your forehead? Can a small thirst be endured by you?
I won't let tears fall from your eyes. I won't let your shadow walk on the ground.
One body, one life, one mind, thinking about it feels sweet.
You are my heart, you are my life.
In the evening breeze, we should walk by the seashore... the green tree changes direction.
The eyes that shine show the way, but if the mind hesitates to reach the shore, is it a mistake?
I locked you in my heart and lost the key.
You are my heart, you are my life.
I was born once, I was born once, I would even give my life for you.
Because I carry you in my heart, I would live beyond death.
I keep you in my eyes and see visions. I failed in trying to forget you for a minute.
You are my heart, you are my life.
